leadText: The Smooth Rock (Japanese: さらさらいわ Smooth Rock) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It extends the duration of sandstorm.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon holding this item creates a sandstorm with the moves Sandstorm or Max Rockfall , or the Abilities Sand Stream or Sand Spit , it lasts eight turns instead of five turns. (Prior to Generation VI , it has no effect on Sand Stream, which creates a sandstorm with indefinite length in those games.) In the Generation VII games, if a sandstorm has its duration extended by the Smooth Rock, the turn counter on the user interface for these effects will indicate that it lasts for 8 turns for the player whose Pokémon used the move, while it will display that it lasts for 5 turns for their opponent. After 5 turns of sandstorm have passed, the user interface will display that it lasts for 8 turns for both players.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Underground HG SS Trade PW Icy Mountain Rd. B W B2 W2 Route 8 (once per day, in the evening) DW * Icy Cave X Y Route 13 , Victory Road OR AS Weather Institute S M US UM Malie City Battle Royal Dome (48 BP ) Sw Sh Hammerlocke Bridge Field ( Digging Duo ) Sw Sh IA Potbottom Desert BD SP Grand Underground S V Delibird Presents ( Cascarrafa Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges ) Sparkling overworld item ( East Province (Area Three) )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of the move Sandstorm used by the holder. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Sandstorm used by the holder. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Sandstorm when used by the holder. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to a sandstorm, the storm will persist for longer than usual.
